columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Guo+2019 or eBOSS ELG data release (arXiv:1811.10583)
extraction_method: transcribe from paper or eBOSS data release
triple_check: z_eff = 0.8 matches eBOSS ELG survey redshift
rp bins and wp values match Figure 3 of Guo+2019
verify pi_max used in their analysis
notes: Planck 2015 cosmology. Extends Guo+2018 with quenched ELG fraction. Published best-fit from Table 3 of Guo+2019.
